packageRules.description: Hold the TypeScript major: v7 is the native (Go) compiler, and the type-check toolchain (@typescript-eslint, svelte-check) still peers at typescript <6.1.0, so the major cannot install/type-check yet. Minor/patch keep flowing. Re-enable once that toolchain declares TS7 support. See anolishq/anolis-workbench#197.
